stemHtml: Who is responsible for ensuring that cabin crew members are competent to perform their duties?

options.a: The Authority of the State in which their activities are carried out, under the EU Regulation on Air Operations.
options.b: The pilot-in-command, in accordance with the Aircraft Flight Manual.
options.c: The Authority of the State in which the aircraft is registered, under national law.
options.d: The operator, in accordance with the Operations Manual.
